fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies a code to identify the electronic document format in the system.

fields.name: Usage
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the electronic document format is used for sales invoices or sales credit memos.

fields.name: Codeunit ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies which codeunit is used to manage electronic document sending for this document sending method.

fields.name: Codeunit Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the codeunit.

fields.name: Delivery Codeunit ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies which delivery codeunit is used to manage electronic document sending for this document sending method.

fields.name: Delivery Codeunit Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the delivery codeunit.
